name: William Clay Ford, Jr.
background: Bill Ford is Executive Chair of Ford Motor Company. He has been a member of the Board since 1988 and served as CEO from 2001 to 2006.

company_affiliations.name: Ford Motor Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Director (1988–Present), Chairman of the Board (1999–Present), CEO (2001–2006), Various management positions (Prior to 1999)
